title: Radio Operator
description:
Role Summary
These jobs are found in country Offices. Jobholders are based in Radio Rooms and typically report to an Information Technology Officer, Security Officer, or the designate. At this level, jobholders work in a team under minimal supervision, and they are expected to produce organized and accurate reports and technical work. As required, they may work with UNDSS Radio Room, especially in case of security incidents. These jobs may require working different shifts and reporting for duty on short notice. The purpose of this job is to support telecommunications services in order to facilitate the efficient implementation of security processes and procedures.

Duties and Responsibilities
Key Duty & Responsibilities:
Coordinate with WFP Security staff and/or UNDSS Radio Room to facilitate accurate and efficient security-related information flow following established standard operating procedures.
Responsible for monitoring and channelling all radio communications, including tracking of WFP vehicle and staff movement to ensure efficient 24-hour coverage of telecommunications Services.
Ensure optimal radio network operations through the implementation of standard operating procedures and the provision of guidelines and training to local radio operators in the region of Assignment.
Produce regular and ad hoc reports, including daily radio checks, staff movement reports and assist in preparing and dispatching the summary of security incidents and other information to staff to facilitate accurate, efficient and concise communication and information flow.
Provide efficient support and training to users on telecommunications equipment and Procedures including Minimum Operating Security Standards (MOSS) requirements to ensure effective use of telecommunications equipment.
Maintain inventory and provide recommendations for potential improvements to support Efficient planning and keeping WFP telecommunications equipment operational.
Create and maintain databases (e.g. lists of call signs, addresses, telephone numbers, wardens, etc.), to ensure accurate information is always available.
Follow established emergency response processes and procedures to ensure prompt assistance in case of emergencies.
Track mission vehicles and movement and provide a report to the head of security.
Equipped new arrival with telecom equipment with basic training and keep log incidents and office daily call office keys.
Monitor UHF repeaters, network and vehicle tracking application, programme telecom equipment and assign call signs to new arrival staff.
Desired Experience and Entry into the Role:
Official training and/or experience using MS Word, MS Excel, MS PowerPoint, and other WFP software is an advantage. Good knowledge of WFP administrative policies, procedures, a corporate application such as WINGS and good command of English and local language/s
Moderate level of knowledge of telecommunication operations, procedures, and high standards. Also have computer literacy, good communication skills with clarity and concisely.
Ability to multi-task and respond simultaneously and in a timely fashion to demanding job requirements.
Ability to prioritize a heavy workload and demonstrate judgment, initiative, alertness, and emotional stability, especially in emergency situations.
Functional capabilities & Competencies:
Keep operationalizing WFP Radio Network 24/7.
Track movement of staff 24/7 and arrange basic Radio training on a timely basis.
Track WFP vehicles and monitor VHF/UHF repeaters 24/7.
Headcount for international staff on the specified timetable with reporting to security unit.
Keep update incident logbook with reporting to security unit if needed with less than 5 minutes delay.
Provide ICT support and equipment delivery to the new arrival and ensure that no security alert is missed.
Achieve 100% security alert sharing with security warden and improve user’s satisfaction ratings by 20% from a security perspective.

Job Requirements
Qualification:
Education:
Completion of secondary school education. Technical training in communication equipment or other work-related areas.
Experience:
Four or more years of progressively responsible work experience in telecommunications/radio operations, information technology, or other relevant fields of work.
Languages:
Fluency (level C) in the UN language in use at the duty station and in the duty station’s language, if different.

Submission Guidelines
This vacancy announcement is for Afghan nationals only and WFP encourages especially Afghan females and Afghans with disabilities to apply.
Please copy and paste the following link into the web browser in order to apply for this position:
https://wd3.myworkdaysite.com/recruiting/wfp/job_openings/job/Kabul-AfghanistanThe-Islamic-Re/Radio-Operator-SC-G_JR123208

title: کارشناس انتقال تکنالوژی جدید
category: Economy, Information Technology, Software Engineering, Industrial
description:
Role Summary
هدف وظیفه:
مجهز سازی سیستم های کاری و تولیدی با تکنالوژی های جدید صنعتی برای ایجاد همسویی با معیار های جهانی جهت رسیدن به اهداف شرکت انکشاف ملی.

Duties and Responsibilities
وظایف تخصصی
انتقال تکنالوژی جدید صنعتی مطابق نیازمندی شرکت انکشاف ملی از کشور های بیرونی.
پی گیری مشکلات تخنیکی و تکنالوژیکی سیستم های کاری و تولیدی شرکت انکشاف ملی و ارائه راه حل های مناسب برای رفع آنها.
ارزیابی و انتخاب تکنالوژی‌های مناسب برای پروژه‌های ملی با در نظر داشت شرایط محلی.
تحلیل امکان‌سنجی تخنیکی و اقتصادی تکنالوژی‌ صنعتی شامل عواید، مصارف، خطرات و پایداری.
محلی ‌سازی و انطباق تکنالوژی‌وارداتی با شرایط افغانستان.
مدیریت و پیگیری مسائل مربوط به مالکیت فکری ثبت، حفظ و استفاده از حقوق معنوی.
مستندسازی دانش، تجارب و ایجاد بانک معلوماتی تکنالوژی‌ های صنعتی .
نظارت بر رعایت معیارهای جهانی (کیفیت، محیط‌زیست، ایمنی) در استفاده از تکنالوژی‌ صنعتی.
ارائه معلومات و آموزش برای کارکنان فنی شرکت در عرصه استفاده از تکنالوژی جدید صنعتی.
وظایف مدیریتی
تدوین و تطبیق ستراتژی انتقال تکنالوژی صنعتی در سطح شرکت انکشاف ملی.
مدیریت پروژه‌های انتقال تکنالوژی از مرحله طراحی تا تطبیق و ارزیابی.
طراحی برنامه‌های آموزشی و انکشافی برای ارتقای ظرفیت کارمندان.
نظارت و ارزیابی عملکرد پروژه‌ها و سنجش تاثیرات توسعه‌ای.
شناسایی خطرات و ارائه راهکار های مدیریتی برای کاهش آن‌ها.
ارائه گزارش‌های تحلیلی به رهبری سازمان جهت تصمیم‌گیری بهتر.
وظایف هماهنگی
ایجاد و تقویت روابط با نهادهای جهانی، تمویل‌کنندگان و شرکت‌های تخنیکی.
هماهنگی با بخش‌های داخلی (تخنیکی، مالی، حقوقی و پالیسی) برای پیشبرد پروژه‌ها.
تسهیل انتقال دانش از متخصصین خارجی به کارمندان داخلی.
همکاری با پوهنتون ها، انستیتوت‌ها و مراکز تحقیقاتی برای ارتقای ظرفیت.
تنظیم و پیگیری قرارداد های انتقال تکنالوژی .
حمایت از نوآوری داخلی و ایجاد ارتباط با مخترعین.

Job Requirements
شرایط استخدام
تحصیلات:
حد اقل دارای سند لیسانس در یکی از رشته های اقتصاد صنعتی، انجینری نرم افزار، تکنالوژی معلوماتی و یا سایر رشته ‌های مرتبط؛ به درجات تحصیلی بالاتر ارجحیت داده میشود.
تجربه کاری:
حداقل ۵ سال تجربه کاری در زمینه های مرتبط برای لیسانس و ۳ سال برای ماستر.
مهارت ها:
توانایی کار با سافت ویر های امور تولید و آشنایی کامل در عرصه برنامه کمپیوتری مورد ضرورت در ادارات.

Submission Guidelines
علاقه‌مندان می‌توانند درخواست‌های شان‌را از طریق وبسایت Jobs.af بفرستند.
برای ارسال درخواستی روی Apply Now کلیک کنید.
نوت: ضمیمه سی‌وی، اسناد تحصیلی و تذکره تابعیت الزامی می‌باشد.

title: IT & Graphic Design Officer
description:
About Blossom Health care center
درباره ما
شفاخانه معالجوی بلاسم در سال ۲۰۰۴ در شهر کابل تأسیس شده است، امروز به‌عنوان یکی از مراکز معتبر، پیشرفته و آکادمیک صحی در افغانستان شناخته می‌شود. این مرکز با ظرفیت 50 بستر، محیطی معیاری و مجهز را فراهم ساخته تا مریضان در فضایی مصئون و آرام، خدمات صحی باکیفیت را دریافت نمایند.
بلاسم با داشتن ۱۰ دیپارتمنت فعال شامل داخله عمومی، جراحی عمومی، جراحی اعصاب، گوش، گلو و بینی (ENT)، نسائی ولادی، چشم، ارتوپیدی، جلدی، داخله اطفال و یورولوژی، توانسته است طیف گسترده‌ای از خدمات تخصصی و فوق‌تخصصی را زیر یک سقف ارائه کند. حضور تیمی از داکتران متخصص و مجرب در هر بخش، این شفاخانه را به یکی از مراکز قابل اعتماد برای تشخیص و تداوی مریضان مبدل ساخته است.
چشم‌انداز (Vision)
شفاخانه معالجوی بلاسم در نظر دارد تا با تکیه بر تخصص مسلکی، تکنالوژی پیشرفته طبی و مدیریت معیاری، به یکی از پیشرفته‌ترین، معتبرترین و مورد اعتمادترین شفاخانه‌های معالجوی کشور مبدل گردد؛ شفاخانه‌ای که در آن خدمات صحی تخصصی و فوق‌تخصصی مطابق با معیارهای ملی و بین‌المللی عرضه شده، مرجع درمانی مریضان در سطح کشور بوده و در ارتقای سلامت جامعه، کاهش مرگ‌ومیر قابل جلوگیری و بهبود کیفیت زندگی شهروندان نقش محوری ایفا نماید.
این چشم‌انداز همچنان بر توسعه پایدار، نوآوری دوامدار، آموزش طبی و پاسخ‌گویی مؤثر به نیازهای رو به افزایش صحی جامعه استوار می‌باشد.
مأموریت (Mission)
مأموریت شفاخانه معالجوی بلاسم عبارت است از عرضه خدمات صحی جامع، مصئون، مؤثر، با کیفیت و عادلانه به تمام اقشار جامعه بدون تبعیض، از طریق:
فراهم‌سازی خدمات تشخیصی، تداوی و جراحــــــی در بخش‌های تخصصی و فوق‌ تخصصی ( نسائی ولادی، جراحی عمومی، داخله عمومی، جراحی اعصاب، ارتوپدی، چشم، گوش گلو و بینی، جلدی، داخله اطفال، یورولوژی و قلبی، جهاز هضمی)
استفاده از تجهیزات مدرن طبی و تکنالوژی‌های نوین تشخیصی و درمانی
به‌کارگیری کادر مجرب، متخصص و متعهد طبی و اداری

Job Description
Position Summary
The IT & Graphic Design Officer is responsible for managing the hospital’s information technology systems, providing technical support, maintaining network infrastructure, supporting digital marketing activities, and designing professional visual materials for organizational branding and communication purposes.
Key Duties and Responsibilities
A. Information Technology (IT) Responsibilities
Install, configure, and maintain required software applications for all hospital departments.
Provide troubleshooting and technical support for computers, printers, scanners, and other digital devices.
Install, configure, maintain, and troubleshoot network equipment including Access Points, Switches, Routers, and related networking devices.
Distribute and manage internet services for all departments according to the approved list provided by the General Administration.
Coordinate and manage database-related activities.
C. Graphic Design Responsibilities
Design professional graphic materials including posters, banners, brochures, flyers, social media posts, certificates, and branding materials.
Create visual content for digital marketing campaigns and hospital awareness programs.
Edit photos, videos, and multimedia content when required for promotional or educational purposes.
B. Marketing Responsibilities
Manage and update the hospital’s social media platforms, website content, and online presence.
Prepare marketing materials, promotional content, announcements, and digital advertisements.
Coordinate with different departments to promote hospital services, events, and awareness campaigns.

Job Requirements
Qualifications and Skills
Proficiency in graphic design software such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Canva, AI tools.
Bachelor’s degree or diploma in Information Technology, Computer Science, Graphic Design, Marketing, or a related field.
Proven experience in IT support, graphic design, and digital marketing.

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates should submit their updated CV, cover letter to the hr.bhcc2026@gmail.com before the announced deadline.
Applicants must clearly mention the position title “IT & Graphic Design Officer” in the subject line of the email.

Submission Email
hr.bhcc2026@gmail.com

title: آمر جمع آوری پول Cash Collection Officer
description:
About Western ISP & ICT Solutions
شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن فعالیت های خویش را در جنوری ۲۰۱۶ به‌عنوان یک شرکت ارائه‌دهنده خدمات انترنتی آغاز کرد. در سال ۲۰۱۷، این شرکت تیمی را برای مدیریت کسب‌وکار آی اس پی تشکیل داد و با شرکت‌های پیشرو آی اس پی و جی اس ام در افغانستان را همکاری نمود
این شرکت روی بخش آی اس پی شرکت سرمایه‌گذاری کرده و در مدت کوتاهی زیربنای لازم را برای فعالیت به‌عنوان یک شرکت آی اس پی مستقل ایجاد نموده و در ماه می ۲۰۲۲ جواز آی اس پی خود را از وزارت مخابرات و تکنالوژی معلوماتی – اداره تنظیم خدمات مخابراتی افغانستان (اترا) دریافت کرد
شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن تمرکز خود را بر ارائه خدمات انترنتی با کیفیت بالا و هزینه مناسب در سراسر افغانستان معطوف نموده است
این شرکت با سرعت قابل توجهی در حال توسعه بوده و با کمک افراد متخصص و با تجربه به فعالیت خود ادامه میدهد. هدف شرکت وسترن ارائه راه ‌حل ‌ها و خدمات انترنتی برای تمام بخش‌ ها و سکتورهای افغانستان می‌باشد

Job Description
تطبیق اصول / مقررات
تطبیق اصول/مقررات به روش شرکت ( معیارات ما برای عملکرد مسلکی) مسؤلیت مشترک همه جوانب ذیدخل جهت اجرای ماموریت شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن است. ما باید همیشه روش شرکت و ( اصول/مقررات) محافظتی را رعایت کنیم
طبق پالیسی شرکت، این شرکت در برابر هر نوع نقض قوانین رفتاری/محافظتی که توسط کارمندان، مشاوران، داوطلبان، ارائه دهنده گان خدمات، فروشنده گان، سرمایه گذاران فرعی/شرکا، شرکت های وابسته و سایر شرکا صورت میگیرد، تحمل صفری دارد
هدف اصلی این بست کاری : آمر جمع آوری پول کسی است که مدیریت حسابات؛ تماس با مشترکین و نهایی کردن پرداخت ها استوار است؛ هدف اصلی آن به حد اقل رساندن مطالبات پولی شرکت و اطمینان از جریان نقدی منظم شرکت است
وظایف و مسئولیت ها
جمع آوری به موقع حق الاشتراک انترنت از مشترکین (حقیقی و حقوقی)؛ کاهش بدهی های پولی؛ ثبت دقیق پرداخت ها و مدیریت روابط با مشتریان در زمینه مالی در مطابقت با پالیسی های شرکت.
بررسی حسابات ؛ نظارت بر سیستم های مالی و حسابداری برای شناسایی مشترکینی که زمان پرداخت پول آن ها فرا رسیده یا گذشته است
تماس با مشترکین؛ تماس تیلفونی؛ ارسال ایمیل؛ پیام یا بازدید حضوری از مشترکین دارای بدهی پولی جهت یادآوری و دریافت پول
مذاکره برای پرداخت؛ گفتگو با مشتریان جهت تعیین تکلیف حساب ها؛ تنظیم اقساط یا نهایی کردن پرداخت های معوق

title: System Administrator
description:
Role Summary
The System Administrator is responsible for the end-to-end management and security of the ISP’s core network infrastructures, including firewalls, routers, switches, and servers across multiple sites. This role supports customers by ensuring stable internet connectivity and reliable service through precise configuration, continuous monitoring, and rapid incident resolution. It also ensures maximum network uptime and peak performance across the infrastructure. Key responsibilities include managing link provisioning, bandwidth allocation, IP address management, and collaboration with upstream providers.

Duties and Responsibilities
Network Infrastructure & Security
· Install, configure, and maintain core routers, switches, and firewalls, ensuring scalability and adaptability to future growth.
· Oversee the operation and firmware updates of primary and secondary firewalls across Main Office and Provincial sites, ensuring optimal performance and security.
· Monitor spanning tree protocols on switches, ensuring data flows through primary point-to-point links and addressing any issues.
· Protect CPE and PTP devices from external network attacks by blocking unauthorized ports and ensuring secure network access.
· Identify customer bandwidth over-usage through weekly monitoring via Cacti servers, apply traffic shaping on CPE devices if limiters fail, and ensure no customer exceeds their contracted bandwidth.
2. Link & Bandwidth Management
· Process link activations, upgrades, downgrades, and suspensions through CRM and coordination with the collections department, ensuring seamless integration with core firewall systems.
· Administer the firewall system dedicated to hotspot users, generating new accounts and allocating bandwidth based on user requirements.
· Record customers’ day and night bandwidth usage and update the records daily; monitor to prevent overload during peak hours, and request bandwidth upgrades for the main office and branches as needed.
· Manage firewall time schedulers for day and night bandwidth allocations, optimizing network usage.
· Oversee demo internet link connections, ensuring customer satisfaction during trial periods.
· Administer customer requests for temporary bandwidth upgrades, ensuring seamless service delivery.
3. Server & System Maintenance
· Conduct monthly HDD diagnostics on the primary server, ensuring data security and system health.
· Maintain and update the Primary and Secondary Cacti servers to ensure better functionality and apply available updates.
· Monitor UCRM server health and apply updates as they become available.
· Monitor NTP server health, specifically for PTP, CPE, and the bandwidth scheduler.
· Maintain EMCO server IP addresses and register new PTP and PTMP links for the alerting system in case of downtime.
4. IP & Device Management
· Update IP allocation sheets for Main office and provincial branches, including devices license keys.
· Monitor the locations of high-capacity devices and their connected base stations.
· Maintain records of customers and sites’ equipment serial numbers for asset record.
5. Monitoring & Troubleshooting
· Identify and resolve WAN, LAN, and WLAN issues promptly to maintain network stability.
· Utilize Intermapper to assess microwave device capacities, ensuring no device is overloaded.
· Update and monitor the WLAN virtualized Layer 2 map for new sector and switch installations, ensuring all PTP devices operate above 10 Mbps LAN speed by actively monitoring the alerting system.
· Oversee the number of tickets created and closed by System/Helpdesk officers, ensuring timely and satisfactory resolution of technical issues.
6. Customer Support & Collaboration
· Collaborate quarterly with the collections department to reconcile active customer bandwidth allocations, including day and night usage.
· Provide online support to team members and customers for any technical-related issues, ensuring prompt resolution.
· Upstream Coordination: Serve as the primary liaison with upstream providers to diagnose and resolve link issues promptly, staying engaged until full resolution to ensure uninterrupted service.
7. Compliance & Web Filtering
· Continuously monitor web filter subnets and liaise with upstream providers to block URLs flagged by ATRA, ensuring permanent enforcement in full compliance with its official directives.
8. Additional Duties
· Perform any other tasks as assigned by management to support network operations and service delivery.

Job Requirements
Required: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Network Engineering, or a related field. Preference will be given to candidates with a Master’s degree in a related major field.
With a Bachelor’s degree: minimum of 5 years’ experience in system or network administration; with a Master’s degree: minimum of 3 years, preferably within an ISP environment.
CCNA and CCNP certifications are highly preferred.
Strong hands-on experience with Cisco, MikroTik, and Ubiquiti (UBQT) devices.
Advanced knowledge of network protocols, including TCP/IP, BGP, OSPF, VLANs, and PPPoE.
Deep understanding of network security best practices and compliance with regulatory directives (e.g., ATRA).
Ability to analyze and resolve complex technical issues efficiently under pressure.
Excellent communication and reporting skills in Dari, Pashto, and English.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their applications by Jun 10, 2026 . To apply, please send your updated CV to vacancies@uatelecom.af
In the subject line of your email, please ensure to include the Vacancy Number and Desired Province. e.g: (UAT-VA-SA-2152-J - Kabul) .
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the written test or interview process.

About Verfied Digital Solutions
Verified Digital Solutions is a Canadian company specializing in accountability, transparency, and digital monitoring solutions for humanitarian and development programs. Verify is a program of Verified Digital Solutions, operating as an independent monitoring and verification platform that supports NGOs, donors, and implementing partners across Afghanistan and other complex environments. Through a combination of digital technology and trained field professionals, Verify confirms that reported activities, services, and aid distributions are delivered as planned and reach intended beneficiaries, strengthening accountability, improving data quality, and reducing the risk of misreporting, fraud, and aid diversion.
Website: verifieddigital.solutions

Job Description
Verify – a Canadian independent monitoring, verification, and transparency platform – is seeking qualified Field Verification Officers to conduct independent field monitoring of donor-funded and NGO-implemented projects across Afghanistan. Verification Officers will travel to project sites, engage with communities, collect evidence, and submit structured reports through Verify's secure digital system. This is a project-based consultancy; officers are assigned to missions based on geographic coverage and project needs.
Key Responsibilities:
Conduct field visits to project sites, including clinics, schools, food distribution points, infrastructure works, and community programs
Verify that reported activities, services, and distributions have taken place as planned
Interview beneficiaries, project staff, and community representatives using structured questionnaires
Collect geo-tagged photographs, GPS data, and monitoring forms using a smartphone
Submit accurate and timely reports through Verify's digital platform
Identify and report discrepancies, risks, or irregularities in project implementation
Maintain strict confidentiality, neutrality, and professional ethics at all times
Reporting and Supervision: Field Verification Officers work under the supervision of the Verify Monitoring Team. Assignments, tools, and reporting templates are provided through the Verify digital platform.
Compensation: Officers are compensated per completed and approved assignment. Payments are made via bank transfer following verification of submitted work.
Ethics and Compliance: All officers must comply with Verify's Code of Conduct, confidentiality policies, and data protection standards. Any falsification, misrepresentation, or conflict of interest will result in immediate contract termination.

Minimum three (3) years of professional experience in Monitoring and Evaluation, third-party monitoring, field verification, or humanitarian project monitoring
Fluency in English, Pashto, and Dari — spoken and written

Ability to use a smartphone for data collection, GPS tracking, and photo documentation
Ability to travel within assigned provinces and districts
High level of integrity, accuracy, and attention to detail

title: Sharia Audit Officer
description:
Role Summary
The Sharia Audit Officer is responsible for conducting periodic Sharia audits across the bank to ensure all products, services, contracts, transactions, and operational processes fully comply with Islamic Sharia principles and the rulings of the Sharia Supervisory Board. The role helps preserve the bank’s Islamic integrity and strengthens governance.

Duties and Responsibilities
1. Sharia Audit Planning & Execution
Participate in preparing the annual Sharia Audit Plan based on risk assessment.
Conduct field audits in branches and departments to verify adherence to Sharia guidelines.
Examine financing files, contracts, documentation, and transaction flows for Sharia compliance.
Test samples of Murabaha, Ijara, Musharaka, Mudaraba, and deposit transactions against Sharia standards.
2. Review of Contracts, Policies & Procedures
Audit the implementation of Sharia-approved product structures and documentation.
Ensure operational procedures match the product manuals approved by the Sharia Supervisory Board (SSB).
Check whether staff are following required Sharia workflows (e.g., asset ownership, agency structures, disclosures, penalties handling).
3. Identification of Sharia Non-Compliance
Identify Sharia violations, deviations, or gaps during audits.
Discuss findings with relevant departments and agree on corrective actions.
Ensure non-compliance events are recorded, reported, and resolved within the required timeframe.
4. Reporting & Documentation
Prepare clear Sharia audit reports with observations, recommendations, and compliance ratings.
Submit audit results to the Head of Sharia Audit and contribute to reports for the Sharia Supervisory Board.
Maintain proper documentation of all audit working papers and evidence.
5. Follow-Up & Corrective Actions
Follow up on previously reported Sharia findings to verify whether corrective actions were implemented.
Work with business units, risk management, operations, and compliance teams to close audit issues.
6. Coordination & Support
Coordinate with Internal Audit and Compliance Department for combined risk reviews.
Provide Sharia guidance to departments during audits to improve their understanding and performance.
7. Capacity Building & Awareness
Support the development of Sharia audit tools, checklists, and audit methodologies.
Assist in internal awareness sessions on Sharia compliance requirements for staff.
8. Continuous Improvement
Stay updated on AAOIFI Sharia standards, new fatwas, and industry best practices.
. Recommend improvements to Sharia audit processes and internal controls

Job Requirements
Qualifications & Experience
Bachelor’s degree in Islamic Studies, Sharia, Islamic Finance, Accounting, or Business Administration.
Professional certification in Islamic finance or Sharia audit (preferred).
1–3 years of experience in Islamic banking, Sharia audit, internal audit, or compliance roles.
Familiarity with AAOIFI standards and Islamic banking products.
Skills & Competencies
Strong understanding of Islamic banking and Sharia principles.
Ability to analyze financial transactions and documentation.
Good report writing skills with clarity and accuracy.
Strong attention to detail and analytical mindset.
Excellent communication and coordination abilities.
High integrity, objectivity, and professionalism.

Submission Guidelines
Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV)/Resume to (sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com)
Please Mention specific Job Title in subject of your E-mail otherwise your Email will not be considered.
Note: only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further recruitment process.

Excellent problem-solving, leadership, and communication skills.
Familiarity with core banking systems and digital platforms.
Fluency in English and local languages (Dari/Pashto) is an advantage.

Strong leadership and problem-solving abilities.
Excellent communication and coordination skills.
Fluency in English; knowledge of Dari and Pashto is an advantage.

title: Sourcing & Quotation Analyst
category: Procurement and logistics, Information Technology, Business Development, Sales, Supply Chain Management
description: Role Summary We are hiring a Sourcing & Quotation Analyst to join our remote team. This is a night shift role. Your shift starts at 5:00 PM Kabul time and runs for 8 hours, aligned with international business hours. Your day will revolve around three things: finding the right opportunities, sourcing the right items from the right vendors, and building clean quotations that win. You will spend most of your shift on calls and emails with international vendors, so strong English and confidence on the phone are non-negotiable. This role is for someone serious. Someone who wants to grow, works hard without being chased, and takes pride in getting the details right. If you are looking for a relaxed 9 to 5, this is not for you. If you want to build a real career and you are willing to put in the work, we want to talk to you. Duties and Responsibilities Opportunity Research Search online portals and platforms for new tenders, RFQs, and product opportunities. Read the requirements carefully and understand exactly what is being asked for. Shortlist the opportunities that fit and flag them to management. Item Sourcing Identify the correct manufacturers and authorized distributors for each item. Verify part numbers, specifications, and compliance requirements before reaching out. Find backup vendors for every key item so we are never stuck with a single source. Vendor Communication Call and email vendors during your shift to request quotes, confirm stock, lead times, and shipping terms. Ask sharp follow-up questions when a quote is incomplete or unclear. Follow up consistently until you have everything you need. No half-finished work. Quotation Preparation Organize vendor pricing in Excel or Google Sheets and compare properly. Build professional quotations using company templates. Triple check every number, SKU, quantity, and date before anything goes out. Coordination and Records Keep clean records of all vendor communication, quotes, and follow-ups. Update internal trackers and CRM tools daily. Work closely with management on final pricing and submission strategy. Never miss a deadline. Discipline and Work Ethic Log in on time. Every shift. Respond quickly on email, WhatsApp, and internal tools during your hours. Keep a professional tone in every vendor interaction. Own your work. No excuses, no shortcuts. Job Requirements Must-Have Fluent English. Spoken and written. You must be able to hold a clear, confident conversation on the phone with international vendors. This is not negotiable. Strong IT background. Comfortable with advanced Google search, Excel or Google Sheets (formulas, filters, sorting), email tools, cloud storage, and basic CRM systems. Sharp critical thinking. You can read a requirement, understand what is being asked, and spot gaps or risks in a vendor's quote. Night shift availability. Ready to work 5:00 PM to 1:00 AM Kabul time, Monday to Friday, without exception. Serious attention to detail. Numbers, SKUs, quantities, and dates must always be right. Discipline and work ethic. Self-driven, reliable, consistent. You do not need someone standing over you to get the work done. Confident on calls. Polite, professional, clear. No slang, no shortcuts. Hungry. You want to build something real and you are willing to put in the work to get there. Nice-to-Have Previous experience in procurement, sourcing, or supply chain. Exposure to international tenders or B2B quotation work. Experience with tender portals or sourcing platforms. Familiarity with Notion, ClickUp, Trello, or similar project management tools. Basic knowledge of IT hardware, industrial equipment, or logistics. Do Not Apply If You are looking for a 9 to 5. You cannot commit to the night shift. You need to be chased to finish work. Your English is weak and you plan to fake it on vendor calls. You cannot. Submission Guidelines Interested candidates should submit their updated CV along with a short introduction (2 to 3 paragraphs) explaining why they are a good fit for this role and confirming their availability for the night shift (5:00 PM to 1:00 AM Kabul time). Send applications to: procurement@vastglobelogistics.com Please write "Sourcing & Quotation Analyst Application" in the email subject line. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Applications without a proper introduction will not be considered.

title: System Administrator
description:
About UA Telecom
UA Telecom is a dynamic and rapidly expanding Internet Service Provider (ISP) in Afghanistan. with operations dating back to 2013. We deliver reliable, high-speed internet services nationwide, utilizing technologies such Wireless, Fiber Optic, Microwave, and VSAT Platforms. Our focus is on providing practical, efficient connectivity solutions tailored to the unique needs of businesses, organizations, and individuals. As we continue to expand, we are dedicated to making a tangible impact by creating local job opportunities and fostering long-term social development in Afghanistan.
For more information, visit www.uatelecom.af

Job Description
The System Administrator is responsible for the end-to-end management and security of the ISP’s core network infrastructures, including firewalls, routers, switches, and servers across multiple sites. This role supports customers by ensuring stable internet connectivity and reliable service through precise configuration, continuous monitoring, and rapid incident resolution. It also ensures maximum network uptime and peak performance across the infrastructure. Key responsibilities include managing link provisioning, bandwidth allocation, IP address management, and collaboration with upstream providers.
Key Responsibilities:
Network Infrastructure & Security
Install, configure, and maintain core routers, switches, and firewalls, ensuring scalability and adaptability to future growth.
Oversee the operation and firmware updates of primary and secondary firewalls across Main Office and Provincial sites, ensuring optimal performance and security.
Monitor spanning tree protocols on switches, ensuring data flows through primary point-to-point links and addressing any issues.
Protect CPE and PTP devices from external network attacks by blocking unauthorized ports and ensuring secure network access.
Identify customer bandwidth over-usage through weekly monitoring via Cacti servers, apply traffic shaping on CPE devices if limiters fail, and ensure no customer exceeds their contracted bandwidth.
2. Link & Bandwidth Management
Process link activations, upgrades, downgrades, and suspensions through CRM and coordination with the collections department, ensuring seamless integration with core firewall systems.
Administer the firewall system dedicated to hotspot users, generating new accounts and allocating bandwidth based on user requirements.
Record customers’ day and night bandwidth usage and update the records daily; monitor to prevent overload during peak hours, and request bandwidth upgrades for the main office and branches as needed.
Manage firewall time schedulers for day and night bandwidth allocations, optimizing network usage.
Oversee demo internet link connections, ensuring customer satisfaction during trial periods.
Administer customer requests for temporary bandwidth upgrades, ensuring seamless service delivery.
3. Server & System Maintenance
Conduct monthly HDD diagnostics on the primary server, ensuring data security and system health.
Maintain and update the Primary and Secondary Cacti servers to ensure better functionality and apply available updates.
Monitor UCRM server health and apply updates as they become available.
Monitor NTP server health, specifically for PTP, CPE, and the bandwidth scheduler.
Maintain EMCO server IP addresses and register new PTP and PTMP links for the alerting system in case of downtime.
4. IP & Device Management
Update IP allocation sheets for Main office and provincial branches, including devices license keys.
Monitor the locations of high-capacity devices and their connected base stations.
Maintain records of customers and sites’ equipment serial numbers for asset record.
5. Monitoring & Troubleshooting
Identify and resolve WAN, LAN, and WLAN issues promptly to maintain network stability.
Utilize Intermapper to assess microwave device capacities, ensuring no device is overloaded.
Update and monitor the WLAN virtualized Layer 2 map for new sector and switch installations, ensuring all PTP devices operate above 10 Mbps LAN speed by actively monitoring the alerting system.
Oversee the number of tickets created and closed by System/Helpdesk officers, ensuring timely and satisfactory resolution of technical issues.
6. Customer Support & Collaboration
Collaborate quarterly with the collections department to reconcile active customer bandwidth allocations, including day and night usage.
Provide online support to team members and customers for any technical-related issues, ensuring prompt resolution.
Upstream Coordination: Serve as the primary liaison with upstream providers to diagnose and resolve link issues promptly, staying engaged until full resolution to ensure uninterrupted service.
7. Compliance & Web Filtering
Continuously monitor web filter subnets and liaise with upstream providers to block URLs flagged by ATRA, ensuring permanent enforcement in full compliance with its official directives.
8. Additional Duties
Perform any other tasks as assigned by management to support network operations and service delivery.

Job Requirements
Required: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Network Engineering, or a related field. Preference will be given to candidates with a Master’s degree in a related major field.
With a Bachelor’s degree: minimum of 5 years’ experience in system or network administration; with a Master’s degree: minimum of 3 years, preferably within an ISP environment.
CCNA and CCNP certifications are highly preferred.
Strong hands-on experience with Cisco, MikroTik, and Ubiquiti (UBQT) devices.
Advanced knowledge of network protocols, including TCP/IP, BGP, OSPF, VLANs, and PPPoE.
Deep understanding of network security best practices and compliance with regulatory directives (e.g., ATRA).
Ability to analyze and resolve complex technical issues efficiently under pressure.
Excellent communication and reporting skills in Dari, Pashto, and English.

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their applications by Jun 30, 2026 . To apply, please send your updated CV to vacancies@uatelecom.af
In the subject line of your email, please ensure to include the Vacancy Number and Desired Province. e.g: (UAT-VA-SA-2154-A - Kabul) .
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the written test or interview process.

description: About Speenkai Speenkai is Afghanistan's first and leading BPO (Business Process Outsourcing) service company, specializing in providing comprehensive administrative and technical support to Afghan-owned companies abroad. Our mission is to empower Afghan entrepreneurs and businesses operating internationally by offering high-quality, reliable support services from our base in Afghanistan. With a team of skilled professionals, we help Afghan companies streamline their operations, enhance efficiency, and achieve success. Job Summary Night-Shift Job Are you a motivated, detail-oriented professional fluent in English, and ready to grow in a dynamic environment? Speenkai, Afghanistan's first BPO service company, and Bay Master Appliance Services LLC are looking to hire experienced individuals to join our full-time night shift team as Dispatchers/Customer Service Representatives. In this role, you will take inbound calls, set appointments for customers, and dispatch technicians efficiently. The ideal candidate will take charge of daily operations, including planning, scheduling, and managing the tech force. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE NOT FLUENT IN ENGLISH to save yourself time. If you have strong communication skills, thrive under pressure, and are passionate about delivering exceptional support, we want to hear from you! Duties & Responsibilities Duties & Responsibilities 1. Receive incoming calls from clients and setup service appointments. 2. Receive incoming calls from technicians throughout the shift. 3. Keep track of daily schedule and job status throughout work schedule. 4. Respond to open email requests and inquiries via email 5. Ability to enter tickets into the CRM Job Requirements Job Requirements · Fluent in English and must possess excellent verbal and written skills. • Motivated self-starter • Office work experience • Ability to multitask in fast paced environment is crucial. • Capable of typing 45+ words per minute necessary • Customer Service skills and Conflict Resolution skills. • Telemarketing experience is a plus • Microsoft Office Products Submission Guideline This link will redirect you to an online assessment. There a video question at the end. If you don not answer, you application will not be accepted. The assessment is around 50 minutes long. Find a quiet place and stable internet. Answers from Ai and cheating cold be identified and will ruin your chances to be considered. Click on the link below, enter your email, and the assessment will be sent to your email to start. title: Software Developer
description:
About Hushmand Shahar Information Technology
About Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company
Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company is a trusted provider of IT solutions, software development, and digital transformation services in Afghanistan. Our mission is to empower businesses with innovative technology solutions that enhance efficiency, security, and scalability.
With a team of experienced professionals, we specialize in custom software development, enterprise solutions, cloud computing, and IT infrastructure services . We are committed to delivering cutting-edge solutions that help organizations stay competitive in the digital world.
Our Services
Software Development: Custom web and mobile applications using Laravel, React, Next.js, and more.
Enterprise IT Solutions: ERP, MIS, CRM, and custom business software.
IT Consultancy: Digital strategy, system integration, and cybersecurity.
Cloud Solutions: AWS, DigitalOcean, Laravel Forge, and cloud-based deployments.
E-Commerce Development: Scalable online store solutions with secure payment gateways.
Why Choose Us?
Expert Team: Skilled professionals with expertise in software engineering and IT solutions.
Quality & Security: Industry-standard practices ensuring high-performance and secure applications.
Client-Focused Approach: Tailored solutions that align with business needs.
Reliable Support: Ongoing maintenance and technical support for seamless operations.
Our Vision
To be a leading technology service provider in Afghanistan, driving digital innovation and business growth.
Our Mission
To develop reliable, scalable, and high-performance technology solutions that help businesses streamline their operations and achieve success.
Job Summary

Job Descriptions
We are seeking a highly skilled Laravel Developer to join our dynamic team at Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company . The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in Laravel, PHP, and modern web development technologies and will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining robust, scalable, and high-performance web applications.
This role requires a deep understanding of MVC architecture, database management, and front-end technologies . As a Laravel Developer, you will collaborate with cross-functional teams to build secure applications, integrate APIs, optimize performance , and troubleshoot technical challenges.

Job Requirements
Proven experience (2+ years) as a Laravel Developer or in a similar role.
Proficiency in PHP, Laravel, MySQL, and object-oriented programming (OOP) .
Strong knowledge of MVC architecture and best coding practices.
Experience in front-end technologies (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Vue.js, React, or Alpine.js).
Familiarity with Laravel Blade templating and Livewire (preferred but not mandatory).
Hands-on experience with RESTful API development and third-party API integration .
Understanding of security best practices , including data encryption and secure authentication.
Experience with queues, cron jobs, and background task processing in Laravel .
Knowledge of Git, GitHub, Bitbucket, or GitLab for version control .
Strong debugging and troubleshooting skills.
Familiarity with Agile development methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) .
Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work independently or within a team.

Submission Guidelines
Vacancy Number: Please mention the vacancy number in the email subject line .
CV & Previous Projects: Applicants must attach their CV and a list with links of previous projects they have worked on.
Email Submission: Send your application to hushmandshahar@gmail.com before the deadline.

Submission Email
hushmandshahar@gmail.com
Apply
